text:
First, we calculate the area of one of the faces of the cube. The area of a square (which is the shape of each face of the cube) is given by the side length squared.

\[ 4^2 = 16 \]

Next, we multiply this area by the side length of the cube to get the volume. Since the side length is 4, we have:

\[ 4 \times 16 = 64 \]

The final answer is 64.
